snippets.title: try / except / else / finally
snippets.explanation: else holds the success path; finally always executes, making it ideal for cleanup.

snippets.title: Catching specific exceptions with a default
snippets.explanation: Handle the narrow, expected failures; group related types in one except using a tuple.

snippets.title: Custom exceptions and chaining
snippets.explanation: Custom exceptions let callers catch your errors precisely; 'from e' preserves the original traceback.

snippets.title: Retry transient API errors with backoff
snippets.explanation: Only transient errors are retried; a bare 'raise' re-raises the current exception after the final attempt.
